MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-06-2019 Vacated

MOTION - Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AMY CHAMBERLIN'S Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment.

GRANT. No opposition filed and the motion complies with the Health & Safety Code. The court will execute the proposed order and judgment.

Order amd Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and Judgement for details)
